title: Global Wakili — Phase 2 Reconciliation Punch List
subtitle: Frontend audit vs GW-EOS v4.0 Playwright Certification Matrix · 2 July 2026 · Read-only recon

blocks.text: The prior "Phase 2 green (12 specs)" reflected route-render + a few interactions — NOT the matrix's full-lifecycle CRUD-per-module standard (Create/Edit/Delete/Archive/Restore/Search/Filter/Pagination/Validation/Audit/Export + business-scenario E2E). The GW-EOS v4.0 Certification Matrix (22 sections, 1,000+ points) is the real bar. This document lists what is genuinely broken/missing against it.

Verification method per item: [code] = source read, [PDF] = user-supplied invoice.pdf, [live] = live API probe. Governing docs: v3.0 Master, v3.1 Phase-3 Addendum, GW-EOS v4.0 Playwright Certification Matrix.

rows: No Delete/Archive/Restore anywhere except calendar events + settings labels; Client/Matter/Document lifecycle actions all missing
Approvals hub orphaned — procurement writes procurementApprovalLog; nothing calls central ApprovalService.createApproval; real submissions never appear in /app/approvals
Invoice not client-sendable — FROM = placeholder 'configure in firm settings' + 'Your Firm'; firm Bank Details exist in Settings but never pulled onto invoice; no Notes display; no Edit action
Client Portal untestable — no CLIENT-role user seeded; needs credential + portalUserId

sections.heading: 2. MEDIUM — missing lifecycle/features the matrix requires

rows: Reports export incomplete — a few keys to CSV only; no PDF, no Excel for most reports
No pagination app-wide — lists use limit=100/500, no pager
Dashboards never link-audited — only 3 loaded; widgets/quick-actions/drill-downs not click-verified
Payments/receipts function but untested + no printable receipt document
TAX-002 — VAT-monthly (needs month) + WHT report (needs from/to) return 400 → sections render empty
TODO-008 document/email integration (HIGH in handover) untested E2E
Landing page stat stale — shows '116' in 5 places; real count now 117
Matter progress % is a manual stored field, not computed from tasks/time — can be stale/inaccurate

sections.heading: 4. UNVERIFIED matrix points (NOT confirmed working — need per-module audit)

items: Matter Court / Opposing Counsel / Team Assignment (§6)
Security: SQL injection / XSS / CSRF / permission-escalation (§17)
Chart of Accounts, Journals, P&L tabs render
Clients search + edit; document upload + preview + download (when signedUrl present)
Firm Bank Details settings section exists (just not wired to invoice)
The MATRIX is the certification standard — the 12 smoke specs are not sufficient.
Sequence: close HIGH (PUNCH-001..004) → build GW-EOS v4.0 matrix auditor (per-module lifecycle + automated dead-link/no-op detection) → re-certify section-by-section.
Do NOT start Phase 3 until PUNCH-001..004 close.
Portal + TODO-008 need a CLIENT credential / integration scope before their sections can certify.
